subject: CEU Webinar Registration Confirmed - Ohio PT Board
snippet: Your registration for the CEU webinar has been confirmed. Please log in 10 minutes before the start time.
body:
Dear Greg Howard,

Thank you for registering for the Ohio Physical Therapy Association CEU Webinar: "Evidence-Based Practice Updates in Pediatric PT" scheduled for Thursday, October 10, 2024 at 6:30 PM Eastern.

Your confirmation number is: OPT-2024-88321
CEU Credit: 2.0 contact hours
Format: Live Webinar via Zoom
Login link will be sent 24 hours prior to the event.

Please log in 10 minutes before the start time. If you have questions, contact ceu@ohiopt.org.

Sincerely,
Ohio PT Board CEU Team

subject: Re: CEU Webinar Registration Confirmed - Ohio PT Board
snippet: Thank you! Quick question-will the recording be available after the live session?
body:
Hello,

Thank you for the confirmation. I wanted to confirm-will a recording of the webinar be available for those who registered but may miss part of the live session?

Also, is the 2.0 CEU credit automatically reported to the Ohio PT Board, or do I need to submit separately?

Thank you,
Greg Howard, PT, DPT
Kestrel Healthcare, Columbus OH

subject: Your Order #SR-20241105 is Confirmed - Scioto Running Co.
snippet: Thanks for your order! Nike Vomero 17 (Women's 8.5) has been reserved for in-store pickup.
body:
Hi Greg!

Thank you for shopping with Scioto Running Co. Your order has been confirmed.

Order #SR-20241105
Item: Nike Vomero 17 - Women's Running Shoe, Size 8.5, Color: Light Smoke Grey
Qty: 1
Price: $164.99
Pickup Location: 1842 N. High St, Columbus OH 43201
Estimated Ready: November 7, 2024

We'll text you when your order is ready. See you on the roads!

The Scioto Running Co. Team
www.sciotorunning.com

subject: Order #SR-20241105 Ready for Pickup!
snippet: Great news! Your Nike Vomero 17 is ready for pickup at our N. High St location.
body:
Hi Greg!

Your order is ready! Come pick it up at your convenience.

Order #SR-20241105 - Nike Vomero 17 Women's 8.5
Pickup at: 1842 N. High St, Columbus OH 43201
Store Hours: Mon-Sat 10am-7pm, Sun 11am-5pm

Reminder: Bring your confirmation email or order number. Orders held for 7 days.

See you soon!
Scioto Running Co.

subject: Saturday dinner - everyone coming?
snippet: Hi sweetheart, just checking if you and Derek can make it Saturday. I'm making lasagna.
body:
Hi sweetheart,

I wanted to check in about Saturday dinner. Dad and I are thinking 5pm at our place. I'm planning to make the big lasagna and garlic bread. Tyler said he can come, and I copied Lauren too.

Can you and Derek make it? Let me know so I know how much to make! Also, should I do the apple crisp or just pick up dessert from Graeter's?

Love,
Mom

subject: Re: Saturday dinner - everyone coming?
snippet: Yes! We'll be there. Derek has a faculty thing until 4 so we'll arrive around 5:15.
body:
Mom!

Yes, we are absolutely in. Derek has a short faculty meeting until 4 so we'll arrive around 5:15 - is that ok? I can bring the apple crisp if you want, I found that recipe you sent me last fall.

Tell Dad I'm on a running schedule so I might sneak out for a quick 3-miler in the morning before we head over.

Can't wait!
Greg

subject: Re: Saturday dinner - everyone coming?
snippet: Perfect! 5:15 is great. Please bring the apple crisp, Dad will be thrilled.
body:
Perfect! 5:15 works great. Please do bring the apple crisp - your father will be thrilled. Lauren is bringing wine.

Tyler texted me, he might bring his girlfriend Megan so I'll set an extra place just in case.

See you Saturday! Love you both.
Mom

subject: Girls' night this month??
snippet: Hey! I feel like we haven't done girls' night in forever. Are you free any Friday in November?
body:
Hey Greg!

I feel like we haven't done a proper girls' night in forever - at least since February. Are you free any Friday in November? I was thinking we could try that new wine bar on Short North, Enoteca 741. I saw it on Instagram and it looks amazing.

Maybe the 14th or 21st? Let me know what works. I can check with Priya too if you want to make it a group thing.

Miss you!
Rachel

subject: Re: Girls' night this month??
snippet: Yes!! November 21st works great for me. Let's do it! I've been wanting to try that place.
body:
Rachel yes!! I've been wanting to try Enoteca 741 since it opened. November 21st works perfectly for me - I have a long run that morning so I'll be in full celebration mode by evening.

Yes, invite Priya! The more the merrier. I can drive if you want so we don't have to worry about parking.

So excited. Text me to confirm?
Greg

subject: You're on the Little Movers Guide beta list!
snippet: Thanks for signing up! You'll be among the first to access the Little Movers Guide beta when we launch.
body:
Hi there!

Thank you for joining the Little Movers Guide beta waitlist. We're so excited to have you!

You're officially on the list and will receive early access before our public launch. Here's what to expect:

- Early access notification 2 weeks before launch
- Beta feedback survey (takes ~10 min)
- Founding member discount (30% off annual plan)

We're building something special for parents and early childhood educators who want evidence-based movement activities for kids ages 0-5.

Stay tuned!
The Little Movers Guide Team
hello@littlemoversguide.com

subject: Auto Insurance Renewal Notice - Policy #SF-4471829
snippet: Your State Farm auto policy is up for renewal on December 15, 2024. Your new premium is $847.00 for the coverage term.
body:
Dear Greg Howard,

Your State Farm Auto Insurance policy is due for renewal on December 15, 2024.

Policy Number: SF-4471829
Vehicle: 2021 Honda CR-V EX
Coverage Period: December 15, 2024 - December 15, 2025
New Annual Premium: $847.00

Your premium reflects a safe driver discount and multi-policy bundle discount.

To review your coverage options or make changes, log in at statefarm.com or contact your agent.

Thank you for being a State Farm customer.

State Farm Insurance
Customer Service: 1-800-STATE-FARM

subject: Auto Insurance Renewal - Payment Confirmation
snippet: Your auto policy renewal payment of $847.00 has been received. Coverage continues through December 15, 2025.
body:
Dear Greg Howard,

We have received your renewal payment.

Policy Number: SF-4471829
Payment Amount: $847.00
Payment Date: November 25, 2024
Coverage Active Through: December 15, 2025

Thank you for renewing with State Farm. Your updated policy documents have been emailed separately.

For questions or claims, contact 1-800-STATE-FARM or visit statefarm.com.

State Farm Insurance

subject: Dinner Wednesday?
snippet: Hey sis! Are you free for dinner Wednesday evening? There's something I want to talk through with you.
body:
Hey sis!

Are you free for dinner Wednesday evening? I was thinking maybe Haiku or somewhere in the Short North. There's something I want to talk through with you - nothing bad, just some career stuff I've been mulling over and you always give good advice.

Derek is welcome too if he doesn't have papers to grade!

Let me know. Around 6:30?
Lauren

subject: Re: Dinner Wednesday?
snippet: Yes! 6:30 works. Derek has a late meeting so it can be just us if you want? I'll book at Haiku.
body:
Lauren!

Yes, Wednesday 6:30 is perfect. Derek actually has department meetings on Wednesdays until 7 so it can just be us two if that's ok? Makes it easier to talk anyway.

I'll make a reservation at Haiku - do you want outdoor seating? Weather looks decent this week.

Now you have me curious about this career thing. See you Wednesday!
Greg

subject: Re: Dinner Wednesday?
snippet: Just us is perfect actually. And yes outdoor please! See you at 6:30.
body:
Just us is actually perfect, thank you. Yes please to outdoor seating!

And don't worry, it's genuinely good news territory - just need to think out loud with someone I trust. You're the best.

See you Wednesday at 6:30!
Lauren

subject: You're Registered! Columbus Half Marathon - October 19, 2025
snippet: Congratulations! Your registration for the Columbus Half Marathon is confirmed. Race bib #14822.
body:
Congratulations, Greg!

You're officially registered for the Columbus Half Marathon!

Race Date: Sunday, October 19, 2025
Start Time: 7:30 AM
Start Location: Broad & High St, Columbus OH
Distance: 13.1 miles
Bib Number: 14822
Wave: B (Corral 2)
Estimated Finish: Based on your submitted time of 2:05:00

Packet Pickup: October 17-18 at the Greater Columbus Convention Center

Thank you for registering. Train hard and see you at the finish line!

Columbus Half Marathon Team
www.columbushalfmarathon.com

subject: Columbus Half Marathon - Training Tips & Packet Pickup Info
snippet: Your race is coming up! Here's everything you need to know about packet pickup and race day.
body:
Hi Greg,

Race day is getting closer! Here's your pre-race checklist:

PACKET PICKUP
Dates: October 17 (3pm-8pm) and October 18 (9am-6pm)
Location: Greater Columbus Convention Center, Hall B
Bring: Photo ID and your confirmation email

RACE DAY LOGISTICS
- Arrive by 6:45 AM
- Bag check closes at 7:20 AM
- Parking available at Franklin County Garage (10th St)
- No race-day registration

See you at the finish line!
Columbus Half Marathon Team

subject: PSLF Certification Form - Acknowledgment
snippet: We have received and processed your Public Service Loan Forgiveness employer certification form.
body:
Dear Greg,

This email confirms that Kestrel Healthcare has completed and submitted the Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) Employment Certification Form on your behalf.

Employee: Greg Howard
Date of Hire: October 14, 2019
Employment Status: Full-Time
Qualifying Employer: Yes - Kestrel Healthcare is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization
Form Submitted To: US Department of Education via MOHELA

Please retain a copy for your records. Processing times by MOHELA typically take 60-90 days.

Questions? Contact HR at hr@kestrelhealthcare.org.

Best,
Kestrel Healthcare Human Resources

subject: Re: PSLF Certification Form - Acknowledgment
snippet: Thank you so much! Should I expect any follow-up from MOHELA directly?
body:
Hello,

Thank you so much for processing this so promptly. I really appreciate it.

Should I expect any follow-up correspondence directly from MOHELA confirming receipt? Is there a tracking number or confirmation code I should reference if I follow up with them?

Also, is there anything I need to do on my end through the MOHELA portal?

Thank you again,
Greg Howard, PT, DPT

subject: Registration Confirmed - Scioto Mile Run 10K, October 4, 2025
snippet: You're registered for the Scioto Mile Run 10K! Bib #3041. Start time 8:00 AM.
body:
Hi Greg!

Your registration for the Scioto Mile Run 10K is confirmed!

Event: Scioto Mile Run 10K
Date: Saturday, October 4, 2025
Start Time: 8:00 AM
Location: Scioto Audubon Metro Park, Columbus OH
Bib Number: 3041
Corral: B
T-Shirt Size: Women's M

Packet Pickup: October 3, 2025 from 3:00 PM - 7:00 PM at Scioto Running Co., 1842 N. High St.

Good luck and see you on the course!
Scioto Mile Run Committee
www.scioto-mile-run.com

subject: Scioto Mile Run 10K - Race Prep Info
snippet: Race day is coming up! Here's your prep info. Don't forget packet pickup is the Friday before.
body:
Hi Greg,

Your race is coming up! A few reminders:

TYPICAL CONDITIONS: Early October mornings are usually around 52 degrees and partly cloudy - great racing conditions!

PACKET PICKUP REMINDER
Friday, October 3 from 3:00 PM - 7:00 PM
Scioto Running Co., 1842 N. High St

RACE DAY
- Arrive 30 min before your wave start
- Parking on Whittier St (free)
- Aid stations at miles 2, 4, and 6

We can't wait to see you out there!
Scioto Mile Run Committee

subject: Thanksgiving plans - can you both come to Dayton?
snippet: Hi Greg dear! I was hoping you and Derek could come to Dayton for Thanksgiving this year.
body:
Hi Greg dear!

I was hoping to talk to you both about Thanksgiving. Marcus and his family are coming, and I would love it if you and Derek could come down to Dayton too. I'll do the full spread - turkey, sweet potato casserole, the works.

I know you might be splitting with your family as well, so maybe you could come Wednesday night and stay through Friday? No pressure at all, just would love to have you here.

Let me know what you're thinking!
With love,
Gloria

subject: Re: Thanksgiving plans - can you both come to Dayton?
snippet: Gloria! We would love that. Derek and I were just talking about this. Wednesday night through Friday sounds perfect.
body:
Gloria!

We would absolutely love that - thank you so much for the invitation. Derek and I were literally just talking last week about Thanksgiving plans, so this is perfect timing.

Wednesday night through Friday sounds ideal. I can bring a dessert - maybe my apple cranberry pie? And I'll check with my mom to make sure we coordinate so everyone gets some time with us.

Can't wait to see you and everyone in Dayton!
With love,
Greg

subject: Register Now: Pediatric Neuromotor Assessment Updates Webinar - Oct 14
snippet: Join us October 14 for a 2-hour CEU webinar on pediatric neuromotor assessment updates. 2.0 contact hours.
body:
Dear Greg,

We are pleased to invite you to our upcoming CEU webinar:

Pediatric Neuromotor Assessment Updates: Clinical Implications for Pediatric PT Practice
Date: Tuesday, October 14, 2025
Time: 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Eastern
Format: Live Webinar (Zoom)
Credits: 2.0 contact hours (Category A)
Fee: $45 for OPTA members / $65 non-members

Presenter: Dr. Amanda Reyes, PT, PhD, Cincinnati Children's Hospital

Topics include: updated standardized assessment tools, neuromotor red flags in the 0-3 population, and telehealth assessment considerations.

Register at www.ohiopt.org/ceu

Ohio Physical Therapy Association

body:

subject: Community Potluck After Service - November 16
snippet: Join us Sunday, November 16 after the 10am service for our monthly community potluck! Sign up to bring a dish.
body:
Dear Clintonville Community Church Family,

Join us on Sunday, November 16, 2025 for our monthly community potluck following the 10:00 AM service!

Sign up to bring a dish at the welcome table or at clintonvillecommunitychurch.org/potluck

We need:
- Main dishes (4 spots)
- Side dishes (6 spots)
- Desserts (4 spots)
- Drinks (3 spots)

Everyone is welcome! Please bring enough to serve 6-8 people.

Questions? Contact Pastor Jim Reardon at jim.reardon@clintonvillecommunitychurch.org

Grace and peace,
Clintonville Community Church

subject: Scioto Running Co. - March Newsletter: Gear Picks & Race Calendar
snippet: Spring is here and so is race season! Check out our top shoe picks, local race calendar, and our group run schedule.
body:

Race season is here and we have everything you need.

FEATURED GEAR
- ASICS Gel-Nimbus 26 - New colorways in stock

LOCAL RACE CALENDAR

GROUP RUNS
Every Saturday 7:30 AM - meet at the store. All paces welcome!

See you on the roads,
The Scioto Running Co. Crew
www.sciotorunning.com

subject: Happy Birthday sis!!
snippet: Happy birthday Greg!! Hope your day is great. Are you doing anything special?
body:
Happy birthday big sis!!

Hope you have an amazing day. Are you and Derek doing anything special to celebrate? Mom mentioned she was making your favorite cake.

I'm in Cincinnati for work this week but I'll call you tonight. Don't let Derek make you do anything boring like watch a documentary!

Love you!
Tyler

We are writing to update you on your Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) payment count.

Account: ending 4821

subject: Transfer dates - November and February
snippet: Hi honey, just checking on the transfer dates we discussed. Can you remind me when to expect those in November?
body:
Hi honey,

Just following up on our conversation about the transfer dates for November and February. Can you remind me of the schedule we discussed? I want to make sure I have everything noted in my calendar so I don't miss anything.

Also - are you coming to the Novak reunion gathering in December? It would be so lovely to see you there. Let me know.

Love,
Aunt Carol

subject: Re: Transfer dates - November and February
snippet: Hi Aunt Carol! The transfer dates are November 1 and February 1. And yes, planning to be at the reunion!
body:
Hi Aunt Carol!

The transfer dates we discussed are November 1 and February 1, both on the first of the month. I've set reminders on my end so we should be all set.

And yes, absolutely planning to be at the Novak reunion gathering in December! Derek is hoping to join too if he's back from his brother's place by then.

Love you!
Greg

subject: 2025 US Road Running Survey - Share Your Voice
snippet: Running USA invites you to participate in our annual road running survey. Takes about 8 minutes.
body:
Dear Greg,

Running USA invites you to participate in our 2025 State of the Sport Annual Survey. Your feedback helps shape the future of road running in America.

The survey takes approximately 8 minutes and covers:
- Race participation habits
- Training patterns
- Shoe and gear preferences
- Race experience and preferences

All responses are anonymous. As a thank you, participants will be entered into a drawing for a $200 Running Warehouse gift card.

Take the survey: www.runningusa.org/survey2025

Thank you for your participation!
Running USA

subject: Saturday dinner - roast this week?
snippet: Hi honey, doing pot roast Saturday at 5. Dad picked up potatoes at Kroger already. You and Derek com...
body:
Hi honey, doing pot roast Saturday at 5. Dad picked up potatoes at Kroger already. You and Derek coming? Should I do the apple crisp or pick up Graeter's?

Love,
Mom

subject: Re: Saturday dinner - roast this week?
snippet: Yes we're in - Derek can bring rolls. Do the apple crisp, please - Graeter's is fine but yours is be...
body:
Yes we're in - Derek can bring rolls. Do the apple crisp, please - Graeter's is fine but yours is better and Derek won't shut up about it for a week if I say Graeter's.

Love you,
Greg

subject: Re: Saturday dinner - roast this week?
snippet: Perfect. Made a double batch, taking the rest to Bible study. Bring Derek's grading pile if he wants...
body:
Perfect. Made a double batch, taking the rest to Bible study. Bring Derek's grading pile if he wants a quiet corner while Tyler and Dad watch the game.

Mom

subject: Re: Saturday dinner - roast this week?
snippet: Told him. He said thank you. Also - Rachel's doing better after the sonogram, wanted you to know.  G...
body:
Told him. He said thank you. Also - Rachel's doing better after the sonogram, wanted you to know.

Greg

subject: voice memo dump - long week
snippet: Hey. Just left you a 12 min voice memo. TLDR the L&D unit was chaos Thursday, I'm exhausted, baby is...
body:
Hey. Just left you a 12 min voice memo. TLDR the L&D unit was chaos Thursday, I'm exhausted, baby is fine, sonogram Monday went great. Don't need advice, just needed to say it. Talk when you can.

R

subject: Re: voice memo dump - long week
snippet: Listened on the run this morning. Sending you the biggest hug. You did not do anything wrong on the ...
body:
Listened on the run this morning. Sending you the biggest hug. You did not do anything wrong on the Ferrera case. I'll call Sunday.

Also - I made zucchini bread and I'm saving you two slices. Non-negotiable.

G

subject: Re: voice memo dump - long week
snippet: You are the best. Also please tell Derek he was right about the ceiling fan direction thing. I will ...
body:
You are the best. Also please tell Derek he was right about the ceiling fan direction thing. I will not be repeating that but it's on record.

R

subject: Re: voice memo dump - long week
snippet: He is going to be insufferable about this.  G
body:
He is going to be insufferable about this.

G

Diane

Greg

D

subject: Re: Fall Festival Oct 4 - Volunteer Confirmation

subject: Beta Signup - Parent M. Alvarez - Q about torticollis exercises
snippet: New signup: Maria Alvarez (Franklin County) - toddler with left-side torticollis, PT stopped last mo...
body:
New signup: Maria Alvarez (Franklin County) - toddler with left-side torticollis, PT stopped last month, wants home continuation exercises. Wants your reply directly.

Signup flow logged.

subject: Little Movers Guide - Torticollis Home Program
snippet: Hi Maria - thanks for signing up. For a toddler who's completed clinical PT, the Chapter 3 stretches...
body:
Hi Maria - thanks for signing up. For a toddler who's completed clinical PT, the Chapter 3 stretches (head-turn stretch, side-lying reach) plus the Chapter 5 balance games work well as a home program.

One thing to watch: if you notice the head tilt returning, that's a signal to loop back with your PT. Home program is maintenance, not a substitute for a return visit if something changes.

Happy to answer follow-ups.

Greg Howard, PT, DPT
Little Movers Guide

subject: Re: Little Movers Guide - Torticollis Home Program
snippet: This is so helpful, thank you. Quick follow-up - are the videos okay to show my son directly? He's 2...
body:
This is so helpful, thank you. Quick follow-up - are the videos okay to show my son directly? He's 2.5 and mimics.

Maria

subject: Re: Little Movers Guide - Torticollis Home Program
snippet: Absolutely. Kids his age mirror well - if he watches with you it usually gets more buy-in than tryin...
body:
Absolutely. Kids his age mirror well - if he watches with you it usually gets more buy-in than trying to instruct verbally. Let me know how it goes.

Greg

subject: Little Movers Guide - Parent Resource Pilot Inquiry
snippet: Hello,  I'm a pediatric PT at Kestrel Healthcare and I've built Little Movers Guide, a family-friend...
body:
Hello,

I'm a pediatric PT at Kestrel Healthcare and I've built Little Movers Guide, a family-friendly exercise guide for parents of kids with developmental delays and post-clinic maintenance needs.

Wondering if the outpatient rehab team at Nationwide Children's would be open to a 20-min call about piloting it as a parent handout. Free for the pilot period.

Greg Howard, PT, DPT

subject: Re: Little Movers Guide - Parent Resource Pilot Inquiry
snippet: Hi Greg - thanks for reaching out. Would you be able to share a summary and the beta site link? I'll...
body:
Hi Greg - thanks for reaching out. Would you be able to share a summary and the beta site link? I'll route to the outpatient PT coordinator.

Denise Whitlock, Community Outreach

subject: Re: Little Movers Guide - Parent Resource Pilot Inquiry
snippet: Denise - thank you.  Summary: 6 chapters covering tummy time, rolling, core strength, fine motor, ba...
body:
Denise - thank you.

Summary: 6 chapters covering tummy time, rolling, core strength, fine motor, balance, and sensory. Video-linked exercises with parent-friendly language. Beta users: 38 families.

Beta site: www.littlemoversguide.com
About: www.littlemoversguide.com/about

Happy to walk through it whenever the PT coordinator has 20 minutes.

Greg Howard, PT, DPT

subject: Re: Little Movers Guide - Parent Resource Pilot Inquiry
snippet: Passed along. PT coordinator will reach out directly if interested. Thanks Greg.  Denise
body:
Passed along. PT coordinator will reach out directly if interested. Thanks Greg.

Denise

body:
Dear Greg Howard,

Your Ohio PT license (PT.008421.OH) renewal window is open. Renewal deadline: January 31, 2027. Required CEU: 24 contact hours over the 2-year cycle.

Current verified CEU on file: 14.0 hours
Outstanding: 10.0 hours

Renew online: license.otpta.ohio.gov

Greg Howard, PT, DPT

subject: Re: PT License Renewal Window Open - PT.008421.OH
snippet: Ohio-approved providers auto-report within 10 business days of completion. If you have out-of-state ...
body:
Ohio-approved providers auto-report within 10 business days of completion. If you have out-of-state CEU or independent study, upload certificates via the portal 'Add CEU' link.

Ohio PT Licensing Board
